notes: startSession: generates UUID, builds queue, creates SessionRecord. markQuestionDisplayed: stamps questionDisplayTime. recordAnswer: isFastTap check, state transition via applyAnswer (with lastMaintenanceSession tracking for mastered/maintenance), or fastTapPending append; advances currentIndex. nextQuestion: flushes fastTapPending when queue exhausted or marks isComplete + increments sessionCount. getCurrentQuestion: resolves current queue ID to Question. endSession: clears session, markDirty. All calls use useStore.getState() for latest state.
